_comment: Active project-local Claude Code hooks for the EverPass mcp-ops mirror. User-authorized 2026-06-30. Ties market-intel insight notes into the cockpit chain automatically: any note added/edited under data/insights/ is propagated into data/mobile/mobile-cockpit.json by scripts/ingest_market_intel.py (idempotent; only rewrites when content changes). Source of truth for the wiring is hooks/insight-chain-hooks.json; mirror these into the live OneDrive tree's settings.json for the same behavior in the runtime.

hooks.command: bash -c 'DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}"; bash "$DIR/scripts/sync-insights-to-chain.sh" 1>&2 || true; echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SessionStart\",\"additionalContext\":\"insight->chain: synced market-intel notes into the cockpit feed (ingest_market_intel.py --all).\"}}"'

bash -c 'INPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$INPUT" | grep -q "data/insights/"; then DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}"; bash "$DIR/scripts/sync-insights-to-chain.sh" 1>&2 || true; echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"insight->chain: a data/insights note changed; ran ingest_market_intel.py --all to update the cockpit feed.\"}}"; else echo "{}"; fi'
